typography-h1.description: H1 heading with display, default, and small variants. Uses extrabold weight, tight tracking, and text-balance for large hero and page titles.

typography-h2.description: H2 heading with default, muted, dimmed, and section (bordered bottom) variants. Includes scroll-margin for anchor links.

typography-h3.description: H3 heading with default, muted, and dimmed variants. Includes scroll-margin for anchor links.

typography-h4.description: H4 heading with default, muted, and dimmed variants. Includes scroll-margin for anchor links.

typography-p.description: Paragraph primitive with semantic variants: body, lead, muted, caption, error, and success. Each variant bundles size, line-height, color, and weight together.

typography-lead.description: Lead paragraph for subtitles and intro text. Default is text-xl, small variant is responsive sm→base.

typography-large.description:
Large semibold text primitive with default and muted color variants. Renders as a

element.

typography-small.description: Small text primitive with default, muted, label (uppercase + tracking), and error variants.

typography-muted.description: Muted text primitive with sm, md, and lg size variants. Always renders text-muted-foreground.

typography-blockquote.description: Blockquote with default, muted, and accent (primary border) variants. No built-in margin — spacing is the consumer's responsibility.

typography-inlinecode.description: Inline code span with default (muted bg), destructive, and ghost (underline dashed) variants. Monospaced, semibold.

typography-chapter.description: Vertical rhythm container for grouping text blocks with consistent gap spacing.

table.description: Composable table primitives: Table, TableHeader, TableBody, TableFooter, TableRow, TableHead, TableCell, TableCaption. Supports hover, selected state, and even-row striping.

list.description: Full composable list system with disc, check, numbered, steps, and icon variants. Includes ListItem, ListItemMarker (with index prop), ListItemCheckbox, and a separate DescriptionList set (dl/dt/dd) for key-value pairs. Variant is shared via context — no manual prop threading needed.

simple-list.description: Lightweight list with disc, check, and plain item variants. Supports bordered style and sm/md/lg sizes. Bullet and text are baseline-aligned via shared leading-6.

texted-separator.description: A horizontal separator with centered inline text. Default and strong variants. Built on shadcn Separator.

faq-accordion.description: A clean FAQ section using reveal-item to show/hide answers
